headline: Millie Turner
body: Birmingham City Women have signed Millie Turner from Manchester United. The 30-year-old made 189 appearances across eight years at Manchester United.✍️
raw_text:
Birmingham City Women have signed Millie Turner from Manchester United.

The 30-year-old made 189 appearances across eight years at Manchester United.✍️
